title: Simply Copper Gear!
description: Adds Copper Tools, Weapons and Armor That's It!
body:
Adds Copper Tools, Weapons and Armor That's It!
Copper Tools/Armor Are a new variant of armor that's in the middle of iron tier and diamond tier!
Use copper ingots to craft Tools/Armor just like any Armor!

Thank you, PLS Download


Made By Sevaisbetter With MCreator

My Curseforge Page: [Sevaisbetter | Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/sevaisbetter/projects)
